tools.name: github_clone_repo
tools.summary: Clone or update a GitHub repository into the workspace.
tools.description:
Clone or update a GitHub repository into the workspace.

Args:
    owner: Repository owner/organization
    repo: Repository name
    branch: Branch to clone (optional)
    force: Force update if exists

Returns:
    Repository clone status and workspace path
tools.returns: Repository clone status and workspace path

tools.name: github_get_terraform_config
tools.summary: Analyze Terraform configuration in a GitHub repository.
tools.description:
Analyze Terraform configuration in a GitHub repository.

Args:
    owner: Repository owner/organization
    repo: Repository name
    config_path: Path to Terraform configuration

Returns:
    Configuration analysis including providers, modules, and structure
tools.returns: Configuration analysis including providers, modules, and structure

tools.name: github_list_terraform_files
tools.summary: List Terraform files in a GitHub repository.
tools.description:
List Terraform files in a GitHub repository.

Args:
    owner: Repository owner/organization
    repo: Repository name
    path: Subdirectory path (optional)
    pattern: File pattern (default: "*.tf")

Returns:
    List of Terraform files with metadata
tools.returns: List of Terraform files with metadata

tools.name: github_prepare_workspace
tools.summary: Prepare a Terraform workspace from a GitHub repository.
tools.description:
Prepare a Terraform workspace from a GitHub repository.

Args:
    owner: Repository owner/organization
    repo: Repository name
    config_path: Path to Terraform configuration in repo
    workspace_name: Custom workspace name (optional)

Returns:
    Workspace preparation status and path

tools.name: terraform_complete
tools.summary: Get completion suggestions for Terraform code at cursor position.
tools.description:
Get completion suggestions for Terraform code at cursor position.

Args:
    file_path: Path to Terraform file relative to workspace
    line: Line number (0-based)
    character: Character position (0-based)
    workspace_path: Optional workspace directory

tools.name: terraform_format_lsp
tools.summary: Format a Terraform file using terraform-ls Language Server.
tools.description:
Format a Terraform file using terraform-ls Language Server.

Args:
    file_path: Path to Terraform file relative to workspace
    workspace_path: Optional workspace directory

tools.name: terraform_hover
tools.summary: Get documentation and information for Terraform resource at cursor position.
tools.description:
Get documentation and information for Terraform resource at cursor position.

Args:
    file_path: Path to Terraform file relative to workspace
    line: Line number (0-based)
    character: Character position (0-based)
    workspace_path: Optional workspace directory

tools.name: terraform_lsp_status
tools.summary: Get the status of the terraform-ls Language Server integration.
tools.description: Get the status of the terraform-ls Language Server integration.

tools.name: terraform_validate_lsp
tools.summary: Validate a Terraform file using terraform-ls Language Server. Provides detailed diagnostics and syntax validation.
tools.description:
Validate a Terraform file using terraform-ls Language Server.
Provides detailed diagnostics and syntax validation.

Args:
    file_path: Path to Terraform file relative to workspace (e.g., "main.tf" or "modules/vpc/main.tf")
    workspace_path: Optional workspace directory (defaults to parent directory of file)

tools.name: terry
tools.summary: Execute Terraform operations with comprehensive output and security validation.
tools.description:
Execute Terraform operations with comprehensive output and security validation.

Args:
    path: Workspace path relative to /mnt/workspace
    actions: Array of Terraform actions to execute (default: ["plan"])
    vars: Terraform variables (optional)

Returns:
    Execution results with detailed output matching API specification
    
Supported actions: init, validate, fmt, plan, show, graph, providers, version
tools.returns: Execution results with detailed output matching API specification Supported actions: init, validate, fmt, plan, show, graph, providers, version

tools.name: terry_analyze
tools.summary: Analyze Terraform configuration for best practices.
tools.description:
Analyze Terraform configuration for best practices.

Args:
    path: Workspace path relative to /mnt/workspace

Returns:
    Analysis report with score, issues, and statistics
tools.returns: Analysis report with score, issues, and statistics

tools.name: terry_environment_check
tools.summary: Comprehensive environment check for Terraform and LSP integration. Checks container environment, available tools, and configuration.
tools.description:
Comprehensive environment check for Terraform and LSP integration.
Checks container environment, available tools, and configuration.

tools.name: terry_file_check
tools.summary: Check Terraform file syntax and readiness for LSP operations. Validates file exists, is readable, and has basic Terraform syntax.
tools.description:
Check Terraform file syntax and readiness for LSP operations.
Validates file exists, is readable, and has basic Terraform syntax.

tools.name: terry_lsp_debug
tools.summary: Debug terraform-ls functionality and LSP client state. Tests terraform-ls availability and basic functionality.
tools.description:
Debug terraform-ls functionality and LSP client state.
Tests terraform-ls availability and basic functionality.

tools.name: terry_lsp_init
tools.summary: Manually initialize LSP client for a specific workspace. Useful for troubleshooting LSP initialization issues.
tools.description:
Manually initialize LSP client for a specific workspace.
Useful for troubleshooting LSP initialization issues.

tools.name: terry_recommendations
tools.summary: Get recommendations for Terraform configuration improvement.
tools.description:
Get recommendations for Terraform configuration improvement.

Args:
    path: Workspace path relative to /mnt/workspace
    focus: Area of focus (cost, security, performance, reliability)

Returns:
    Recommendations based on the selected focus area
tools.returns: Recommendations based on the selected focus area

tools.name: terry_security_scan
tools.summary: Run security scan on Terraform configuration.
tools.description:
Run security scan on Terraform configuration.

Args:
    path: Workspace path relative to /mnt/workspace
    severity: Minimum severity to report (low, medium, high, critical)

Returns:
    Security scan results with vulnerabilities and summary
tools.returns: Security scan results with vulnerabilities and summary

tools.name: terry_version
tools.summary: Get Terraform version information and provider selections. Returns version details and available provider information.
tools.description:
Get Terraform version information and provider selections.
Returns version details and available provider information.

tools.name: terry_workspace_info
tools.summary: Analyze Terraform workspace structure and provide recommendations. Shows file structure, configuration status, and LSP readiness.
tools.description:
Analyze Terraform workspace structure and provide recommendations.
Shows file structure, configuration status, and LSP readiness.

tools.name: terry_workspace_list
tools.summary: List all available Terraform workspaces in /mnt/workspace. Returns workspace paths with initialization status and metadata.
tools.description:
List all available Terraform workspaces in /mnt/workspace.
Returns workspace paths with initialization status and metadata.

tools.name: terry_workspace_setup
tools.summary: Create a properly structured Terraform workspace ready for LSP operations. Sets up basic files and directory structure.
tools.description:
Create a properly structured Terraform workspace ready for LSP operations.
Sets up basic files and directory structure.
